'''鈭歵-f-b-dh''' ('''katafbedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jake|jake]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-f-b-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jake|jake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-f-b-dh
|-
! Lemma
| katafbedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitafbedhoko|thitafbedhoko]] || [[word:jitafbedhoko|jitafbedhoko]] || [[word:shitafbedhoko|shitafbedhoko]] || [[word:kitafbedhoko|kitafbedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutafbedhoko|thuthutafbedhoko]] || [[word:jujutafbedhoko|jujutafbedhoko]] || [[word:shushutafbedhoko|shushutafbedhoko]] || [[word:kukutafbedhoko|kukutafbedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutafbedhoko|thutafbedhoko]] || [[word:jutafbedhoko|jutafbedhoko]] || [[word:shutafbedhoko|shutafbedhoko]] || [[word:kutafbedhoko|kutafbedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutafbedhoko|thutafbedhoko]] || [[word:jutafbedhoko|jutafbedhoko]] || [[word:shutafbedhoko|shutafbedhoko]] || [[word:kutafbedhoko|kutafbedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetafbedhoko|thetafbedhoko]] || [[word:jetafbedhoko|jetafbedhoko]] || [[word:shetafbedhoko|shetafbedhoko]] || [[word:ketafbedhoko|ketafbedhoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotafbedhoko|thotafbedhoko]] || [[word:jotafbedhoko|jotafbedhoko]] || [[word:shotafbedhoko|shotafbedhoko]] || [[word:kotafbedhoko|kotafbedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotafbedhoko|thotafbedhoko]] || [[word:jotafbedhoko|jotafbedhoko]] || [[word:shotafbedhoko|shotafbedhoko]] || [[word:kotafbedhoko|kotafbedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tafbedhoko|th忙tafbedhoko]] || [[word:j忙tafbedhoko|j忙tafbedhoko]] || [[word:sh忙tafbedhoko|sh忙tafbedhoko]] || [[word:k忙tafbedhoko|k忙tafbedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatafbedhoko|thathatafbedhoko]] || [[word:jajatafbedhoko|jajatafbedhoko]] || [[word:shashatafbedhoko|shashatafbedhoko]] || [[word:kakatafbedhoko|kakatafbedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatafbedhoko|thatafbedhoko]] || [[word:jatafbedhoko|jatafbedhoko]] || [[word:shatafbedhoko|shatafbedhoko]] || [[word:katafbedhoko|katafbedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatafbedhoko|thatafbedhoko]] || [[word:jatafbedhoko|jatafbedhoko]] || [[word:shatafbedhoko|shatafbedhoko]] || [[word:katafbedhoko|katafbedhoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
